title: Refined Construction Sticks
description: Allows Construction Sticks to use items inside a Refined Storage network
body:
Refined Construction Sticks
Overview

Refined Construction Sticks add support for construction sticks to use items from your refined storage network. To connect a Construction Stick to the network simply right click on a controller. After that your stick will use blocks from your refined storage network instead of your invenotry! Lines turn blue when you are using from your refined storage network 

Support

Join the BBL Discord for support, report bugs and suggest features or additions. You can also support me on Patreon to gain Alpha access to Modpacks and Mods in dev
